seoTitle: Newport News Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks, PDF
seoDescription: Find the NNPS 2026-2027 calendar with holidays, Aug 24 first day, Jun 8 last student day, Winter Break, Spring Break, teacher workdays, exam dates, printable PDF and calendar download.
calendarNotes: Newport News Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 24, 2026. Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Spring Break runs April 5-9, and the last student day is June 8, 2027. The calendar also lists teacher planning days, regional professional development, exam dates, early dismissals, and tentative high school graduation dates.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Newport News Public Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: All students report on Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is NNPS Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Newport News in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Tuesday, June 8, 2027. The last teacher day is June 9.

calendarFaqs.q: Are Newport News high school graduation dates final for 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar labels June 3-4, 2027 as tentative high school graduation dates.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Newport News Public Schools have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The NNPS 2026-2027 calendar lists early dismissal dates, including half-day dismissal and exam-related early dismissal dates during the school year and final week.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the NNPS 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The Newport News Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar lists 180 instructional days for students.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the Newport News Public Schools calendar include teacher workdays?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The NNPS calendar includes teacher planning days, regional professional development days, and teacher workdays separately from regular student attendance dates.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Newport News Public Schools calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: The official NNPS calendar PDF is linked from this page, and families can also download the MySchoolDates calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Newport News Public Schools start after winter break?
calendarFaqs.a: Newport News Public Schools reopens after Winter Break on Tuesday, January 5, 2027. January 4 is listed as a teacher planning day with schools closed for students.

calendarFaqs.q: Are NNPS calendars different for elementary and high schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Most districtwide dates apply across NNPS schools, but high schools have additional exam dates, early dismissal schedules, and tentative graduation dates. Families should check campus notices for school-specific schedules.

calendarFaqs.q: Does this page include school-specific NNPS events?
calendarFaqs.a: This page focuses on the districtwide NNPS academic calendar. School-specific events, bell schedules, athletics, performances, testing details, and campus announcements should be confirmed directly with the school.

customSections.label: Newport News Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027 Highlights
customSections.content: These are the NNPS dates families usually need first when planning the 2026-2027 academic calendar.

groups.label: Most important dates
items: High school graduation dates are listed as tentative for June 3-4, 2027.

groups.label: Planning notes
items: Families planning vacations should pay close attention to Winter Break and Spring Break because they are the longest districtwide student breaks in the NNPS academic calendar.
High school families should review January and June exam windows separately because exam periods can affect early dismissal, transportation, and after-school schedules.
Graduation dates are listed as tentative, so senior families should verify final ceremony dates, times, and locations before making travel arrangements.

customSections.label: How to Add the NNPS Calendar to Google Calendar
customSections.content: Download the NNPS 2026-2027 calendar file from this page when you want a one-time import for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook. The file is generated from reviewed calendar records and does not automatically update if Newport News Public Schools revises the official calendar.

groups.label: Calendar import steps
items: Download the NNPS .ics calendar file from the calendar download section.
Open Google Calendar and choose Settings, then Import & export.
Upload the .ics file and select the calendar where the NNPS dates should appear.
Confirm school holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, and key dates after import.

customSections.label: Month-by-Month Planning Tips for NNPS Families
customSections.content: Use these Newport News Public Schools planning notes to connect major calendar dates with family scheduling decisions.

groups.label: Key planning windows
items: August: complete enrollment, transportation, and school supply planning before all students report on August 24.
December-January: arrange childcare and travel around Winter Break and the January 4 teacher planning day.
January and June: review exam and early dismissal dates, especially for high school students.
April: Spring Break is scheduled April 5-9, with students returning after the break and teacher planning period.
June: confirm tentative graduation dates and summer program timing before the last student day on June 8.

customSections.label: Newport News Public Schools Calendar Changes
customSections.content: Compared with the previous Newport News Public Schools calendar, this Newport News Public Schools school calendar 2026-2027 overview keeps a similar late-August start and early-June finish while shifting several key dates one calendar day earlier.

rows: Starts and ends one calendar day earlier
Starts and ends one calendar day earlier

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break is the first week of April for Peninsula school divisions.

yearNumbers.label: Last Student Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last student day is June 8, 2027.
